lore:quest.name: Ashes on the Road
lore:quest.description: Fen Greenhollow's waystation on the east road has gone dark — no lantern, no answer, no pigeons. Find what is left of it, and find out why the roads between the hill villages are going quiet.
steps: Accept the quest from Fen Greenhollow when his cart visits Elderfall.
Travel east along the road and find the Burned Waystation.
The quest completes automatically at the site; report what you saw.
